info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing ecommerce platform related operations including products, orders, and user accounts.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management, including listing, creation, updating, and deletion.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for managing customer orders, status tracking, and order history.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management including registration, authentication, and profile updates.

post.description: Register a new user account by providing necessary user details. Returns the created user information upon success.

example.message: Provided user data is invalid or incomplete.
A user with the given email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Place an order on behalf of the user identified by userId. Returns the details of the placed order.

example.message: Order request data is invalid or incomplete.

404.description: User not found for placing order

example.message: No user found with the specified userId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Get detailed information about an existing order by orderId.

example.message: The orderId parameter is invalid.
No order found with the specified orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to user's cart
post.description: Add an item to the shopping cart for the user specified by userId. Returns the updated cart.

requestBody.description: Item to add to the user cart

example.message: The item details provided for adding to cart are invalid.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Retrieve the current shopping cart contents for the user identified by userId.

example.message: The userId provided is invalid.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve the tracking status for a specific order
get.description: Fetch detailed tracking information for the order identified by the orderId parameter. This includes the current location, status updates, and expected delivery times to keep the customer informed about their shipment.

example.message: The order with the specified orderId was not found.

details.issue: No order exists with the provided orderId

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create a new product entry with all necessary details such as name, description, price, and stock. This operation accepts product data and returns the created product resource with identifiers and metadata.

requestBody.description: Represents the new product information to be added.

example.name: Wireless Headphones
example.description: High quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

example.message: The submitted product data is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the same name or SKU already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive and process payment gateway webhook events
post.description: Process incoming webhook notifications from payment providers. These notifications include transaction updates, payment confirmations, or cancellations, enabling real-time payment status tracking.

requestBody.description: Payload representing the payment gateway event data.

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.
Payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds or invalid method.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Begin a payment process by submitting required payment details such as amount, currency, and payment method. Returns payment authorization and transaction details upon success.

requestBody.description: Payment initialization data including amount, currency, and method.

example.message: Submitted payment details are invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Card number is invalid or missing

example.message: Payment authorization failed due to insufficient funds or blocked card.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway.

transactionId.description: Unique identifier for the transaction within the payment gateway.

totalAmount.description: The total amount for the order before discounts.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

currency.description: Currency code for the order amounts.

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user who placed the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user data was last updated.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product.

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price.

category.description: Category to which the product belongs.

stock.description: Number of items available in stock.

quantity.description: Number of units ordered for the product

price.description: Original price per unit of the product

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount

quantity.description: Number of units for this cart item

productId.description: Identifier for the product added to the cart

price.description: Unit price of the product before any discounts

discount.description: Discount applied to the product per unit in the cart

finalPrice.description: Price to be paid per unit after discount

productName.description: Name of the product in the cart

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking info was last updated

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order being tracked

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier company handling the delivery

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated date and time for delivery

status.description: Current delivery status of the order

trackingId.description: Unique tracking number provided by the courier

totalAmount.description: Sum total amount of all items before discount

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the entire cart

currency.description: Currency code for the amounts in ISO 4217 format

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning this cart

items.description: List of items currently present in the cart

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable after applying discounts

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the cart was last updated

amount.description: The total amount to be paid

paymentMethod.description: Method of payment chosen by the user

currency.description: Currency code for the transaction, compliant with ISO 4217

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway through which the payment is processed

phone.description: User's phone number in E.164 format

preferredCurrency.description: User's preferred currency code according to ISO 4217

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the payment was created

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order associated with this payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

paymentMethod.description: The payment method used in the transaction

currency.description: Currency code used for the payment, ISO 4217 format

transactionId.description: Identifier for the transaction assigned by the payment gateway

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the product was created

rating.description: Average user rating of the product

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI settings

currency.description: Currency code in which the price is listed, ISO 4217 format

stock.description: Number of items currently in stock

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the product details were last updated

message.description: Detailed error message for the client

status.description: HTTP status code for the error

path.description: Request path that caused the error

details.description: Detailed issues related to the error

field.description: Field name related to the issue

issue.description: Description of the issue with the field

message.description: Detailed error message for the client

status.description: HTTP status code for the error
